item.title: Kyoto Xanadu official trailer, second TV commercial
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Featuring the theme song "From 'i'" by LinoN.

Falcom has released a two-minute trailer and new TV commercial for Kyoto Xanadu, featuring new gameplay cuts and the theme song “From ‘i'” by in-game virtual singer LinoN. The theme song is also available now to download or stream via music services like mora, music.jp, Spotify, Amazon Music, Apple Music, and YouTube Music.

Kyoto Xanadu is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 16 in Japan and Asia. A western release is also planned.

Watch the trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Trailer

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese

Simplified Chinese

TV Commercial #2

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese

Simplified Chinese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯

item.title: Mario Kart World version 1.7.0 update now available
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Two new Knockout Tour routes and Photo Mode stickers.

Nintendo has released the version 1.7.0 update for Mario Kart World, which adds two new routes to Knockout tour, plus a new feature that lets you place stickers in Photo Mode.

Here are the details:

■ New Routes Added to Knockout Tour

Knockout Tour is a mode where you race from one end of the vast world to the other. It starts with 24 drivers, and if you don’t place high enough by the time you reach each of the five checkpoints… you’re out!

Now, two new routes are being added to Knockout Tour: Drill Rally and Boomerang Rally.

Drill Rally

A route that connects Wario Shipyard and Bowser’s Castle.

Boomerang Rally

A route that connects Salty Salty Speedway and Whistlestop Summit.

These new routes become selectable once you clear at least one Knockout Tour rally.

Additional Knockout Tour routes are also planned for future updates.

■ Stickers Added to Photo Mode

When taking pictures using Photo Mode, you can now place stickers you’ve collected.

You can also combine them with frames, making it easy to create original photos. You can use touch controls or Joy-Con 2 mouse controls to place stickers, so give it a try!

Mario Kart World is available now for Switch 2.

Watch a new trailer below.

Version 1.7.0 Update Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/mario-kart-world-version-1-7-0-update-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Shueisha Games and Magnus Games Studio reveal open-world survival crafting RPG Wild Wild Eden
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Due out in Early Access in spring 2027.

Publisher Shueisha Games and developer Magnus Games Studio have officially revealed open-world survival crafting RPG Wild Wild Eden, previously announced as Project Survival in July 2023. It will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam in spring 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via Shueisha Games:

■ About

An Open-World Survival Adventure About Building a Bond with Monsters

What happens when open-world survival meets an emotional bond with monsters? Wild Wild Eden takes players to a breathtaking, untamed planet filled with wonder. Floating landmasses drift across the skies, forgotten ancient ruins lie waiting to be discovered, and mysterious creatures roam the wilderness—each one unlike anything you’ve ever encountered. In place of the home you’ve lost, an untouched world awaits.

Scale towering mountains, dive into shimmering seas, and build your own unique settlement. Tame wild beasts and ride them across the skies or use the game’s deep breeding system to create a one-of-a-kind companion. Whether playing solo or online with friends, each new day brings fresh discoveries and adventures.

While many survival games treat monsters as little more than tools for efficiency, the creatures of Wild Wild Eden are something more! They are companions, family, and members of your tribe. The unexpected behaviors and interactions displayed by the creatures you bring home make the world feel truly alive.

The bonds you forge become your greatest strength, giving rise to an entirely new kind of survival experience—one centered on emotion, exploration, and storytelling. A survival adventure designed not only to challenge players, but to move them.

Product Information

  • Title: Wild Wild Eden
  • Platform: PC (Steam)
  • Genre: Open-World Survival Crafting RPG
  • Release Date: Spring 2027 (Early Access)
  • Player(s): 1~, Max Number of Concurrent Players TBA
  • Languages: Japanese, English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
  • Rating: RP
  • SRP: TBA
  • Publisher: Shueisha Games
  • Developer: Magnus Games Studio
  • Copyright: ©Magnus Games Studio / SHUEISHA, SHUEISHA GAMES

■ Key Features

High-Quality Anime-Inspired Visuals

While many survival games feature photorealistic visuals, Wild Wild Eden embraces a high-quality anime-inspired art style. Truly breathtaking moments across its fantasy world await!

Explore an Untamed Planet Filled with Floating Lands and Mysterious Creatures

Vast forests, magnificent mountains, glittering oceans, and enigmatic ancient ruins are waiting to be discovered. Every journey into the wilderness offers more than just valuable resources; it brings players one step closer to uncovering the secrets of this mysterious planet. From floating landmasses in the sky to new and extraordinary creatures, exploration is driven by curiosity, wonder, and the thrill of discovery.

Craft, Build, and Create a Home That Reflects Your Vision

Gather resources, craft tools and equipment, and construct a settlement that truly feels like your own. With intuitive building mechanics, you can freely create your ideal home across nearly every corner of the world and bring your personal sense of style and creativity to life.

Build atop a waterfall, inside a volcano, or anywhere your imagination takes you. Break free from convention and create the paradise of your dreams.

Beyond survival, Wild Wild Eden offers a rich and rewarding life-simulation experience. Enjoy activities such as farming and fishing, and enlist the help of your monster companions in your daily life. Water Slimes, for example, can assist with tending crops by helping cultivate fields and even automatically watering them for you.

Tame Wild Beasts and Take to the Skies on Their Backs

The monsters that inhabit this world are more than just foes to overcome—they are invaluable companions on your journey. Once tamed, they can carry you across vast landscapes, soar through the skies, fight alongside you in battle, and become cherished members of your settlement.

Whether exploring uncharted regions or facing the dangers of the wilderness, the bonds you forge with your companions will shape every step of your adventure.

Genetics Forge the Ultimate Companion—A One-of-a-Kind Partner All Your Own

Raise a companion unlike any other with the game’s deep breeding system. By pairing creatures of the same species, you can pass down abilities, traits, and unique characteristics to future generations.

Hatch and raise new offspring as you pursue the perfect combination of stats and traits, carefully breeding for the ultimate companion. You may even discover exceptionally rare color variations along the way.

The quest to create a one-of-a-kind partner is a journey that can last hundreds of hours, offering endless possibilities for experimentation, optimization, and discovery.

Every monster you encounter is full of personality. The companions you choose to befriend—and the bonds you build along the way—will shape your own unique adventure.

Not Tools, but Family—Forge Bonds on an Emotional Survival Adventure

The creatures of Wild Wild Eden are not disposable resources or tools to be exploited. They are companions, family, and members of your tribe.

Watch as they gather together, show affection toward the player, and sometimes surprise you with amusing and unexpected behaviors. The bonds you build with your companions are more than just a source of comfort—they are an essential part of surviving and thriving on this untamed planet.

Monsters enjoy a peaceful afternoon nap. Heartwarming encounters await throughout the world.

Play Solo or Thrive Together Online

Set out on your own and carve a path through the wilderness, or team up with friends to build sprawling settlements and thriving communities. In online multiplayer, every player can forge their own role within the world.

Will you become a master breeder, raising generations of exceptional companions? Or a visionary architect, creating awe-inspiring structures that reshape the landscape? How you play—and who you become—is entirely up to you.

Embark on a journey to uncharted lands with your companions.

  • ❮
  • ❯

■ Story

A New Frontier Awaits

Your home planet has suffered a catastrophic disaster, leaving it beyond recovery. In search of a new place to call home, the survivors set out across the stars in pursuit of a brighter future. What they discover is an untamed world overflowing with abundant resources and extraordinary lifeforms—a planet untouched by civilization and rich with possibility.

To survive in this new land, you must explore, craft, and forge bonds with the creatures that inhabit it. Build a new life, uncover the planet’s secrets, and shape your own destiny.

Your new adventure begins here.

■ Messages from the Development Team

Message from DC Gan and Welson Gan, Magnus Games Studio

Hello everyone!

We’re DC and Welson, co-founders of Magnus Games Studio, and we’re thrilled to finally share the game we’ve poured our hearts and souls into with all of you.

Wild Wild Eden is an open-world, anime-inspired survival crafting RPG born from a passionate collaboration between the team at Magnus Games Studio and the incredible team at Shueisha Games. Whether you choose to brave the wilderness as a lone wanderer or jump into online co-op with friends to create unforgettable memories together, how you experience the world is entirely up to you.

This project has been a truly special journey for us. Since founding our studio in 2017, we’ve remained dedicated to creating monster-raising games inspired by our lifelong love of animals. Our passion for rivers, mountains, and exploring the unknown—as well as the time we’ve spent with our own dogs and reptiles—has provided endless inspiration throughout the years. We’ve poured all of those experiences and emotions into this new adventure, combining monster raising, exploration, survival, and crafting into a single experience.

At the heart of Wild Wild Eden lies a central mystery: The truth behind our world’s rebirth.

For centuries, we were taught that our home planet had been completely destroyed, forcing our ancestors to flee into the cold emptiness of space. But now, after countless generations, we have finally returned.

Only to find that everything has changed.

Was the history we were taught the truth? What really caused the destruction of our home world? As survivors setting foot on this land once more, we are not simply struggling to stay alive. We are here to reclaim what was lost and uncover the dark secrets buried beneath the surface of this world.

We are creating this game because it is the adventure we ourselves have always wanted to experience. We can’t wait for you to step into the untamed wilds of Eden and begin your own journey.

So, are you ready to reclaim our home?

We’ll see you in the world of Wild Wild Eden very soon.

Message from Producer Masakazu Kobayashi, Shueisha Games

This title was first announced in 2023 as Project Survival, and I am very pleased to finally unveil its reborn form under its official title, Wild Wild Eden.

Since the game’s initial announcement, we’ve changed development engines, and both its visuals and its core have evolved significantly. Switching engines was a major decision during development, but DC, Welson, and the entire team at Magnus Games Studio made it happen. I’m truly amazed by their dedication and ability to deliver a game of such incredible quality.

I’m confident that players will be able to feel the passion and effort that has gone into every aspect of the game.

There are so many things I’d love to talk about—the improvements, the exciting new features, the visuals, and much more—but I hope you’ll continue following our updates as we prepare to bring the game into your hands. We can’t wait for you to experience it for yourselves.

Your survival adventure is just around the corner. We just need a little more time and polishing to make it the best it can be. We’ll see you again very soon!

Message from Assistant Producer Raycley Zhang, Shueisha Games

There are already many outstanding survival games that have come before us, and throughout development our team spent a great deal of time asking ourselves: “What makes this game unique? What is it that only this game can offer?”

The answer we arrived at was the bond between players and their monsters—the opportunity to spend time together not as tools or resources, but as true members of the family.

Feed them, and they’ll happily come running to greet you. Watch them relax in their favorite spots or play together with other monsters. At times they may be a little clumsy, but they’ll always do their best to help support your settlement.

Our goal was never to create a world that players would visit briefly, enjoy for a while, and then leave behind. We wanted to create a warm and welcoming home—a place where players genuinely think, “I want to live in this world forever.”

From mischievous little companions and adorable creatures to towering beasts, a wide variety of monsters are waiting to meet you. We hope you’ll shower them with affection and enjoy the life you build together in the world of Wild Wild Eden.

Watch a set of reveal trailers below. View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Traditional Chinese

Gameplay Trailer

English

Japanese

Traditional Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/shueisha-games-and-magnus-games-studio-reveal-open-world-survival-crafting-rpg-wild-wild-eden
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PATLABOR the Case Files third trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5

Relive moments from the Mobile Police Patlabor series.

Publisher Good Smile Company and developer Chime Corporation have released the third official trailer for 3D action game PATLABOR the Case Files, as well as opened the second wave of pre-orders for the Special Edition.

Here are the latest details:

Relive the World of Mobile Police Patlabor

PATLABOR the Case Files is a 3D action game that lets players experience many of the most memorable moments from the beloved Mobile Police Patlabor series.

Key Features

  • Story missions playable from both the perspective of Special Vehicles Section 2 and the opposing side.
  • Pilot more than 20 different Labors, including iconic machines such as Ingram, Griffon, and Type Zero.
  • A Simulator Mode featuring shooting practice and Labor-versus-Labor battles.

Story

Labors are giant robots originally developed for industrial use.

As their adoption across construction and civil engineering rapidly expanded, Labor-related crime also became increasingly common. In response, the Tokyo Metropolitan Police established the Special Vehicles Section 2 Patrol Labor Unit to combat this new threat.

Thus, the Patlabor was born.

Third Trailer Introduces Three Distinct Game Modes

The new trailer highlights the game’s three primary modes:

  • Main Mission
  • Another Side Mission
  • Simulator Mode

In addition to showcasing gameplay from each mode, the trailer offers a first look at the fully voiced story sequences featuring members of Special Vehicles Section 2 Division 2, along with plenty of newly revealed scenes from throughout the game.

Limited Special Edition Returns for Second Pre-Order Wave

Following strong demand, Good Smile Company has opened a second round of pre-orders for the PATLABOR the Case Files Special Edition.

The Special Edition includes the exclusive MODEROID Griffon the Case Files Color Ver. plastic model kit, available only with this release.

As a first-print bonus, players will also receive an Original Soundtrack CD featuring 30 tracks, including the game’s opening theme, “the Case Files,” newly composed by acclaimed composer Kenji Kawai.

The Special Edition is available exclusively through the Good Smile Company Online Store and is produced as a made-to-order item.

Please note that, due to limited production quantities, pre-orders may close before launch.

PATLABOR the Case Files Coming to Anime Expo 2026

PATLABOR the Case Files will be featured at the Good Smile Company booth during Anime Expo 2026, one of North America’s largest anime conventions, held in Los Angeles, California.

Visitors will be able to watch the newly released third trailer, giving overseas fans an early look at the latest footage from the game.

Please note that this appearance will consist of trailer screenings only. No merchandise sales or playable demo will be available.

PATLABOR the Case Files is due out for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam this summer.

Watch the trailer below.

Trailer #3



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/patlabor-the-case-files-third-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
